testcase.name: shouldReturn400WhenSearchingWithInvalidStatus
testcase.skipped: org.opentest4j.TestAbortedException: Assumption failed: API bug: invalid status returns 200 instead of 400, skipping test at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assumptions.throwAssumptionFailed(Assumptions.java:316) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assumptions.assumeFalse(Assumptions.java:191) at com.api.tests.PetCrudTest.shouldReturn400WhenSearchingWithInvalidStatus(PetCrudTest.java:212) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:569) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)
testcase.system-out: 21:39:04.817 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Searching pets with invalid status: invalidStatus 21:39:06.508 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Response status: 200

testcase.name: shouldReturn404WhenFetchingPetWithInvalidIdFormat
testcase.system-out: 21:39:06.521 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Fetching pet with invalid id format: abc 21:39:07.300 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Response status: 404

testcase.name: shouldReturn200WhenCreatingPetWithDuplicateId
testcase.system-out: 21:39:07.405 [main] DEBUG com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Test pet ready -> id: 7, name: baboon, status: pending 21:39:07.405 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Creating first pet with id: 7 21:39:08.596 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Creating duplicate pet with same id: 7 21:39:09.362 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Response status: 200

testcase.name: shouldReturn404WhenUpdatingNonExistingPet

testcase.name: shouldReturn404WhenDeletingAlreadyDeletedPet
testcase.system-out: 21:39:10.147 [main] DEBUG com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Test pet ready -> id: 38, name: herring, status: available 21:39:10.148 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Creating pet to delete: herring 21:39:10.923 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- First delete -> id: 38 21:39:11.701 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Second delete attempt -> id: 38 21:39:12.456 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Second delete response: 404

testcase.name: shouldReturn400WhenCreatingPetWithoutName

testcase.name: shouldPerformFullPetLifecycle
testcase.system-out: 21:39:13.225 [main] DEBUG com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Test pet ready -> id: 23700, name: platypus, status: pending 21:39:13.225 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Creating pet: platypus 21:39:14.002 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Pet created -> id: 23700, name: platypus 21:39:14.005 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Fetching pets with status: pending 21:39:14.785 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Pets returned: 16 21:39:14.793 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Uploading image for pet id: 23700, path: src/test/java/com/api/sources/cat.png 21:39:15.899 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Upload response: 200 21:39:15.900 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Updating pet -> old name: platypus, new name: updated_platypus 21:39:16.672 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Pet updated -> name: updated_platypus, status: sold 21:39:16.675 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Form update -> id: 23700, new name: form_updated_platypus, new status: pending 21:39:17.453 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Form update response: 200 21:39:18.231 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Pet after form update -> name: form_updated_platypus, status: pending 21:39:18.232 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Deleting pet id: 23700 21:39:18.996 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- Delete response: 200 21:39:19.780 [main] INFO com.api.tests.PetCrudTest -- GET after delete -> status: 404
